title: R5D district (flat-roof envelope) - maximum building height (no setback)
description: DRAFT extraction (needs_review) of the flat-roof envelope HEIGHT constraint for the exact R5D district per NYC Zoning Resolution section 23-422 (City of Yes, Last Amended 2024-12-05). The source gives R5D a single maximum building height (45 ft) with NO setback. R5D is encoded SEPARATELY from R5 even though both cap building height at 45 ft: R5 mandates a base height (35 ft) + setback (section 23-423), whereas R5D has NO base-height split and NO setback. Only max_building_height is emitted; a base height and a setback are NOT invented for R5D. NOT a Verified determination.

citations.quote: In the district indicated, the maximum building height shall be 45 feet.

inputs.name: zoning_district
inputs.description: Residence district governing the lot. Applicability equals R5D (via in_set); R5/R5A/R5B are NOT matched.

inputs.name: overlay_present
inputs.description: True iff zoning.commercial_overlays[] is non-empty; when true -> professional_review_required (section 23-44).

inputs.name: special_district_present
inputs.description: True iff zoning.special_districts[] is non-empty; when true -> professional_review_required (section 23-44).

inputs.name: historic_district
inputs.description: True iff the lot is in a designated Historic District (section 23-426); when a caller supplies true -> professional_review_required.

outputs.name: max_building_height
outputs.description: Maximum building height (ft) for R5D. Separate typed constraint; not a buildable-envelope result. R5D has no setback in the source.

parameters.name: building_height_ft
parameters.note: R5D maximum building height 45 ft (section 23-422), with no setback. Candidate value pending raw-HTML verification and G6 approval.

exceptions.description: A commercial overlay may modify residence-district height (section 23-44); the citywide value is not emitted as final. Professional review required.
A mapped special district may modify height (section 23-44); the citywide value is not emitted as final. Professional review required.
In a designated Historic District the height may be constrained (section 23-426); the citywide value is not emitted as final. Professional review required.

uncertainty_policy.note: An uncertain, split, sliver, or invalid M2-T013 geometric district assignment is never collapsed into a single definitive district: coverage downgrades to professional_review_required (or data_conflict).

limitations: Draft extraction pending raw-HTML source verification and G6 qualified-human legal approval; not a Verified determination.
The source gives R5D only a maximum building height (45 ft) with no base height and no setback; neither is invented for R5D.
R5D shares the 45 ft building cap with R5 but is a DISTINCT envelope (R5 mandates a base height + setback; R5D does not); they are encoded as separate rules.
The section 23-424 qualifying-residential-site alternative (base 45 / building 55) is a SEPARATE rule (r5-qrs-height) and applies only where the section 12-10 test is met.
